headline: Stock Market Today, March 30: Boston Scientific Falls After Delivering Underwhelming Trial Results
summary: Today, March 30, 2026, investors send Boston Scientific shares lower as they dig deeper into the company's latest trial update.

headline: FDA clears Medtronic’s Stealth Axis system for cranial and ENT procedures
summary: Medtronic views Stealth Axis as the ‘cornerstone’ of AiBLE, the company’s surgical workflow ecosystem.

headline: Medtronic wins FDA clearance for robot in cranial, ENT surgeries
summary: The surgical navigation and robotics system is part of the company’s push to expand its share of the $15 billion cranial and spinal technologies market.

raw.headline: Medtronic wins FDA clearance for robot in cranial, ENT surgeries

headline: Merit Medtronic Deal Highlights ViaVerte Potential And MMSI Valuation Gap
summary: Merit Medical Systems (NasdaqGS:MMSI) has entered a new distribution agreement with Medtronic covering the FDA cleared ViaVerte basivertebral nerve ablation system. The expanded partnership focuses on commercializing a minimally invasive solution for chronic vertebrogenic low back pain through Medtronic’s established pain therapy channels. The agreement broadens Merit's presence in interventional pain management while adding a differentiated product to Medtronic’s neurointerventional and...
